rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE VIOLET T. DUNNINGS REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Angelique Mcguire'S Petition For Instructions And For Removal Of Trustees, Appointment Of A Receiver Or Temporary Trustee, An Accounting, To Surcharge
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/19/20. (No earlier availability.) Still no courtesy copies of all filed papers. (Two copies of the petition were received by the Examiner but no copy of declarations filed on 9/18/19 and 11/18/19.) No correct proof of service of the mandatory Judicial Council form Notice of Hearing. A petition involving a trust must state the names and last known addresses of all vested or contingent beneficiaries. [CRC 7.902.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ALEXANDER JONATHAN JEW
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required as petitioner seeks to be appointed in pro per with full authority and no bond (estate is all personal property). petitioner may be asked about his experience and knowledge of probate procedure. the court to consider whether, or under what conditions, it might grant the request to waive bond.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DAVID ROBERT SENECHEK
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/19/20. No earlier date available. Both parents of the decedent POST-deceased (survived) her; the petitioner must address who the successor-in-interest is for each parent (did they die testate or intestate and was a personal representative appointed for each or either parent's estate or did they or either of them have trust, and who is the trustee?).
